text_preview:
1 
 
 
  
 
          
PRODUCT USER MANUAL 
 For global sea ice concentration, edge, type and 
drift 
Near real time observations 
 
Copernicus Marine  product: 
SEAICE_GLO_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_001 
 
 
Corresponds to the 4 OSI SAF products: 
[OSI-401-d] Global Sea Ice Concentration (SSMIS)  
[OSI-408-a] Global Sea Ice Concentration (AMSR2) 
[OSI-402-d] Global Sea Ice Edge 
[OSI-403-d] Global Sea Ice Type 
[OSI-405-c] Global Low Resolution Sea Ice Drift  
 
 
 
 
Issue:  1.16 
 
Contributors: Steinar Eastwood, Signe Aaboe, Thomas Lavergne 
Approval Date: 06 2024 
 
 

 
 
PUM for global sea ice 
SEAICE_GLO_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_001

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for global sea ice concentration, edge, type and drift near real-time observations provided by Copernicus Marine with the product ID SEAICE_GLO_SEAICE_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_011_001.
